$comment: Copy this file to runtimes.config.json and uncomment/edit the block matching your corporate Qwen Code (or Claude Code) fork. See docs/setup-by-local-agent.md §1.6 for the three worked examples and the inspection procedure. Unknown ${placeholders} pass through unchanged so typos surface; supported placeholders are listed in daemon/runtimes/runtimes-config-schema.ts.

qwen.$comment-A: EXAMPLE A — fork is identical to upstream Qwen. Don't add a runtimes.qwen block at all; delete this file.
qwen.$comment-B: EXAMPLE B — fork renames --yolo to --auto-approve, --mcp-config to --mcp:

runtimes._$comment-C: EXAMPLE C — fork emits JSON Lines and wants the system prompt as a file. Replace the qwen block above with this shape:
